title: Add Python TX reservation tokens
description: Replace coarse LinkLayer TX serialization with entry-specific in-flight reservations and per-send completion. Concurrent high-priority frames should enter between transmissions without allowing preemption/removal of the in-flight entry, ambiguous send() results, duplicate retries on cancellation, or radio concurrency. Include bridge create_task concurrency and cancellation tests.
close_reason: Added TX reservation tokens to TxQueue.reserve/complete and LinkLayer drain_tx_queue for per-send completion; prevented in-flight preemption, added bridge create_task concurrency+cancellation tests; Python link tests 149/5 pass, ruff/mypy gates pass
